message:
refactor(reservations): improve checkReservation logic clarity

Restructure checkReservation to clearly separate ownership checks:
- Track holding reservations (own and others) in a single pass
- Fail fast on first exclusive block from another agent
- Shared reservations from others are non-blocking
- Return aggregated info about all relevant reservations

Also updates reservation-conflicts.ts with related refactoring.

This makes the access control logic more readable and correctly
handles edge cases with overlapping shared reservations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
